name: Create Water
description: You create up to 10 gallons of clean water in an open container within range.

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Water carries a faint mineral taste. Can be drawn from the Plane of Water.

flavorLore: In the bone-dry wastes of Athas, this spell is worth more than gold.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, a gaunt Athasian Water Cleric kneeling in cracked red sand under the double suns, hands cupped as pure water coalesces, silt storms in distance, grotesque heroic anatomy, dramatic chiaroscuro, heavy ink linework, desaturated burnt oranges and sickly greens, harsh shadows, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors
sourceBooks: Dark Sun Revised Boxed Set p. 172
Earth, Air, Fire and Water p. 42

name: Magical Stone
description: Imbue up to three pebbles. They become +1 sling stones dealing 1d4+1 bludgeoning.

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Stones feel unnaturally heavy and warm.

flavorLore: The bones of Athas rise to strike her enemies.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, an Earth Cleric hurling glowing magical stones at a charging foe, dramatic rim lighting, grotesque detail, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors
sourceBooks: Dark Sun Revised Boxed Set p. 173

name: Produce Flame
description: A flame appears in your hand. Hurl for 1d8 fire damage (ranged spell attack).

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Flame burns with unnatural intensity under the crimson sun.

flavorLore: Even in a scorched world, fire answers its priests.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, a Fire Cleric holding a searing flame atop a volcanic outcrop, grotesque heroic anatomy, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors
sourceBooks: Dark Sun Revised Boxed Set p. 174

name: Endure Heat / Endure Cold
description: Target ignores extreme heat or cold on Athas (no exhaustion).

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Essential survival magic across the Tablelands.
athasianVariant.materialComponentAthas: Drop of water or pinch of ash

flavorLore: Athas kills the unprepared. This spell grants one more day.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, a priest enduring blistering heat and freezing night, skin cracked but unburned, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors
sourceBooks: Dark Sun Revised Boxed Set p. 175

name: Cure Light Wounds

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Healing feels like cool water flowing through the veins.

flavorLore: Water is life. Water priests are the last true healers on Athas.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, Water Cleric laying hands on a dying warrior, soft blue glow against harsh desert, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors

name: Bless
description: Up to three creatures gain +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.
flavorLore: Even without gods, the planes grant strength to the faithful.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, a priest blessing warriors before battle under the crimson sun, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors

name: Command
description: Target obeys a one-word command (Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt).
flavorLore: The voice of the planes compels obedience.

name: Light
description: Object emits bright light in a 20-foot radius.

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Often appears as flickering elemental flame or glowing crystal.

flavorLore: A rare comfort in the endless night of Athas.

name: Sanctuary
description: Creatures must succeed on Wisdom save to target the warded creature.

athasianVariant.materialComponentAthas: A small silver mirror or elemental token

flavorLore: The planes shield the faithful from harm.

name: Purify Food and Drink
description: Purifies 1 cubic foot of food or water, removing poison and disease.
flavorLore: One of the most vital spells for survival on Athas.
artworkPrompt: In the style of Gerald Brom, a Water Cleric purifying foul silt water for thirsty tribesmen, , Gerald Brom style, Dark Sun campaign setting, grimdark, surreal, detailed anatomy, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors

name: Remove Fear
description: Suppresses fear effects on one creature.
flavorLore: Courage is rare beneath the crimson sun.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Outlines creatures in magical light, granting advantage on attacks against them.

athasianVariant.modifiedEffect: Often appears as flickering crimson or solar fire.

flavorLore: The sun itself marks the unworthy.
